photodetector.note: Calibrated RP DC-path response after the current DC attenuation/splitting chain. Set null to estimate from model + dc_path.

dc_path.note: Nominal DC attenuation before RP input; explicit photodetector.scope_response_v_per_w overrides this estimate.

rf_path.note: Measured total RF gain seen by RP/FPS4 for bias tee + amplifier; used as spectrum external_gain_db.
